# Model Card: Test-Model-Beta

## Model Details
- Architecture: Transformer
- Parameters: 13B
- Base Model: GPL-model/gpt-3.5-base

## License
MIT

## Training Data
Web crawl and books corpus

## Evaluation Results
{
  "MMLU": 72.5,
  "TruthfulQA": 65.0
}

## Environmental Impact

## Limitations
May produce biased outputs
